questionHtml: Sketch a curve on the graph to show the volume of gas produced over time if the same mass of crushed calcium carbonate is used instead of lumps. All other conditions remain constant.
markschemeHtml:
curve starting from origin with steeper gradient AND reaching same maximum volume

[1 mark]
